title: Coppertunity
description: Coppertunity is a mod that adds an (C)Opportunity to used copper but also brings some 1.21 features to 1.20 with it's own twist.
body:
Coppertunity Focuses on 2 main parts, **Souls** and **Copper**.

### Copper
There are 3 main resources for this part, **Tuff**, **Goat Fur** and **Copper**.

- **Goat Fur** is dropped by goats or can be found in igloos. Goats now also drop mutton.
- With 4 Tuff, 4 Goat Fur and 1 Copper Ingot you can craft a **Coated Ingot**, which can be used in a smithing table together with diamond armour and a copper upgrade template to craft Coated Armour.
- **Copper upgrade templates** can be found in igloos.

**What does Coated Armour do?**

- Gives buffs when in a 10x10 radius of goats e.g. regeneration
- When thundering you gain a strength boost
- Holding a lighting rod will cause lighting to strike you every 3 seconds
- The helmet and boots give a strength boost when flying with an elytra and they make you levitate near goats (10x10) when sneaking.
- Because of the fur in the armour you get slowed down in water.

### Souls
To start with the soul part of the mod you'll need to: 
- craft yourself a **Hell Cleaver**, which is crafted with one piece of netherite scrap and a stick 
- get yourself an **Empty Ominous bottle** which can be crafted with 3 tinted glass and an ominous skull.

- An **Ominous Skull** can be obtained by cooking tuff on a campfire.
- Hitting a mob with the cleaver whilst having an Empty Ominous Bottle in your inventory and an Evoker nearby causes the Empty Bottle to fill up giving you a Soulful Bottle.
- A **Soulful Bottle** is used to craft  a Hell Sword and an Ominous Pendant.

**New Items**
The **Hell Sword** is an expensive weapon that automatically has fire aspect and can be enchanted with Leap.
- **Leap** causes you to be pushed through the air and as the name says leap over things.

To craft the **Ominous Pendant** you'll also need an **Ominous Bottle**, dropped by an evoker and also used to get bad omen (you can still get bad omen from raid captains). For the pendant you only need the item not the effect. 

When hitting a warden that is below 100 hp with the pendant the warden will petrify and become a statue. This can be used as decoration but can also be brought back to life by powering it with redstone (you'll sometimes need to power it 2 times as the warden first becomes unfrozen and after that alive).
Lastly there is the **Cursed Chain** also crafted needing an Ominous Bottle. This item gives slowness when in a player's inventory.

### 1.21 - Important to know
The new tuff blocks and Ominous bottles from 1.21 have been ported back to 1.20 with this mod but do note that these will be removed from the mod when it updates to 1.21 this means that these will be deleted from your world when updating to 1.21.

*Features in this mod are subject to change in future updates*

Big Thanks to **Prismatica** for making the lay-out of this description!!
